herosection.herotitle: Finance lights the path, Empowerment takes its root, Freedom’s doors open.
herosection.heroparaone: At Lumhera, we bring financial literacy to life through Esther the Investor: an interactive game where children learn by doing, with a special focus on empowering girls.
herosection.heroparatwo: Because the best way to understand money is by experiencing, exploring, and making decisions.
herosection.heroparathree: We believe money should be a tool for independence and opportunity. We equip the next generation with the skills, confidence, and agency to shape their own futures.

description.paragraph: We blend storytelling, games, and hands-on experiences to teach children and families the building blocks of financial literacy — saving, spending, investing, and more — in ways that feel natural and fun.
Through interactive learning, Lumhera helps children understand money by making decisions, exploring consequences, and building confidence step by step.
Our approach supports families, schools, and learning communities with accessible tools that make financial education engaging, practical, and age appropriate.

accordions.title: Story
accordions.content: Children follow a guided journey that introduces financial concepts in context, making them intuitive and meaningful.

accordions.title: Play
accordions.content: Interactive games, challenges, and quizzes turn each concept into action—allowing children to make decisions, test outcomes, and learn through experience.

accordions.title: Foundations
accordions.content: Grounded in real-world banking experience and aligned with OECD financial literacy frameworks, combining practical insight with academic rigor.

leftParagraphs: Lumhera’s first interactive experience, Esther the Investor, turns financial learning into an immersive, story-driven adventure.
Children follow Esther, a curious 12 year old, as she discovers how money shapes the world — guided by King Croesus and his cat Bucks.
partTwo.rightLargeHeading: Esther the Investor The Beginning of the Journey

partThree.largeHeading: The Principles That Guide Everything We Do

accordions.title: Freedom through Financial Confidence
accordions.content: When children understand how money works, they gain the confidence to make decisions and shape their own path. Financial knowledge becomes a foundation for independence.

accordions.title: Empowerment through Education
accordions.content: Education unlocks potential. By making financial concepts accessible and engaging, we give children the tools to act, decide, and grow with confidence.

accordions.title: Equality and Inclusion
accordions.content: Every child deserves access to financial education. We are especially committed to empowering girls, ensuring they see themselves as capable decision-makers from an early age.

accordions.title: Control over Anxiety
accordions.content: Money should feel understandable, not overwhelming. By building clarity and confidence step by step, we help children replace uncertainty with a sense of control.

accordions.title: Evidence Over Trends
accordions.content: Our approach is grounded in real-world experience and aligned with proven frameworks. Every element is designed to deliver meaningful and lasting learning.

accordions.title: Clarity Unlocks Complexity
accordions.content: Simple, intuitive experiences make complex financial ideas accessible. Through play and exploration, understanding becomes natural and engaging.

paragraphs: Children learn best when they experience what they’re learning. Lumhera turns money into a story — through choices, puzzles, and real consequences that make financial ideas tangible.
Lumhera puts children at the center of learning — where financial confidence begins.
Through our interactive, story-driven tools, kids explore how money works in ways that feel natural, playful, and empowering.
Our curriculum is built on the OECD/INFE Financial Competence Framework for Children & Youth, ensuring that every experience develops real-world financial skills

banner.heading: Start Your Journey
banner.description: Take the first step towards financial empowerment today!

cards.heading: Learn at Home
cards.description: Esther the Investor gives children the opportunity to explore financial concepts at their own pace, independently or alongside their families. The experience encourages curiosity, sparks conversations about money, and helps transform everyday situations into meaningful learning moments.

cards.heading: Learn at School
cards.description: Esther the Investor can complement classroom learning by providing an engaging way to introduce financial concepts and encourage discussion. Through shared experiences and challenges, students develop a deeper understanding of how money influences individuals, businesses, and society.

cards.imageAlt: Monaco, the first Esther the Investor pilot location
cards.heading: Monaco Pilot
cards.description: Monaco will serve as the first pilot for Esther the Investor and the broader Lumhera vision. By working with families, educators, and local stakeholders, we aim to demonstrate how experiential financial education can build confidence, understanding, and long-term financial capability in the next generation. The lessons learned from Monaco will help shape future deployments in schools and communities around the world.
